This family is native to the Northern Hemisphere, with many species found in Asia, Europe, and North America. The Caprifolium splendidum is further classified under the genus Caprifolium, which is a small genus of flowering plants. The genus Caprifolium is closely related to the genus Lonicera, which includes the common honeysuckle species.
